# Hyundai B2B Storefront

Hyundai B2B Storefront is a high-performance ecommerce platform for commercial and industrial generators, parts, and maintenance services.

## Main Routes
- [/](/): Homepage with featured product categories, bestselling generators, promotions, and expert insights.
- [/products](/products): Catalog of diesel, gasoline, and gas generators with faceted search, filters for power, phase, and brands.
- [/solutions](/solutions): Custom power solution design, calculations, ATS integration, and consultations for factories and buildings.
- [/services](/services): Warranty registration, onsite technical support, preventative maintenance contracts, and parts sourcing.
- [/cart](/cart): Shopping cart interface for ordering products or submitting quotes request.
- [/login](/login): Authentication portal for business clients and partners.
- [/register](/register): Business registration page including business license and corporate info validation.

## Technical Details
- Built with Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, and Radix UI.
- Direct Database connection via @nhatnang/database with Drizzle ORM and PostgreSQL.
- Hybrid Cart System utilizing Zustand client persistence for guest clients and database storage for authenticated B2B buyers.
